request: Reviewer R9. Read-only. Review DinoBrain unfinished OS completion plan for install/release/new-PC parity. Inspect at minimum: <machine-local-path> <machine-local-path> docs\OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS.md, docs\INSTALL.md, docs\VERIFICATION.md, install.ps1, package.json, and rg hits for installer, release, managed hook, new-PC, launcher, uninstall, purge. Output ONLY this structure: reviewer_id=R9; verdict=AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED; blocking_objections=[...]; required_doc_changes=[...]; evidence_files=[...]. Judge whether plan completion conditions are sufficient for a new computer install to recover app/data version parity, Codex/Claude MCP+hooks, Observatory/verifier launchers, uninstall/purge safety, release manifest, and GitHub data sync equivalence. If no blocking objection, verdict AGREE.
